CREATE TABLE moods (id INT, mood_value mood);
SELECT DISTINCT mood_value FROM moods WHERE mood_value = ANY(enum_range(NULL::mood));
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT, user_mood mood);
SELECT u.user_id, u.user_mood FROM users u WHERE u.user_mood IN (SELECT unnest(enum_range(NULL::mood)));
CREATE TABLE user_actions (action_id INT, user_mood mood);
SELECT ua.action_id FROM user_actions ua JOIN users u ON ua.user_mood = u.user_mood WHERE u.user_mood IN (SELECT unnest(enum_range(NULL::mood))) ORDER BY ua.action_id;
CREATE TABLE mood_logs (log_id INT, mood_entry mood);
SELECT ml.log_id, COUNT(*) AS mood_count FROM mood_logs ml GROUP BY ml.mood_entry HAVING ml.mood_entry IN (SELECT unnest(enum_range(NULL::mood)));
